markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Nico O'Reilly records the first goal for England during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Norway vs England professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 11, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Norway vs England professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 11, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored. If the team's first goal of the match is an own goal, the market will resolve based on the next non-own-goal scored for that team.
markets.title: Nico O'Reilly: England First Goalscorer

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If John Stones records the first goal for England during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Norway vs England professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 11, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Norway vs England professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 11, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored. If the team's first goal of the match is an own goal, the market will resolve based on the next non-own-goal scored for that team.
markets.title: John Stones: England First Goalscorer
